nl_query: What are the top 5 sellers by total revenue?
sql: SELECT seller_id, ROUND(SUM(price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM order_items GROUP BY seller_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

nl_query: How many orders were placed each month in 2018?
sql: SELECT MONTH(STRPTIME(order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) AS month,COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE YEAR(STRPTIME(order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) = 2018 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl_query: What is the average review score per product category?
sql: SELECT p.product_category_name, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score FROM reviews r JOIN order_items i ON r.order_id = i.order_id JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name ORDER BY avg_score DESC

nl_query: Which states have the highest average delivery delay?
sql: SELECT YEAR(STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) AS year,ROUND(SUM(i.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items i ON o.order_id = i.order_id GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

nl_query: What are the most common payment types?
sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM payments GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY count DESC

nl_query: Which sellers have more than 200 orders?
sql: SELECT seller_id, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count FROM order_items GROUP BY seller_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) > 200 ORDER BY order_count DESC

nl_query: What is the total revenue by year?
sql: SELECT YEAR(STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) AS year, ROUND(SUM(i.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items i ON o.order_id = i.order_id GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

nl_query: What percentage of orders were delivered on time?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN order_delivered_customer_date <= order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS on_time_pct FROM orders WHERE order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL

nl_query: What are the top 10 product categories by number of items sold?
sql: SELECT p.product_category_name, COUNT(*) AS items_sold FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name ORDER BY items_sold DESC LIMIT 10

nl_query: Which cities have the most customers?
sql: SELECT customer_city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY customer_city ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 10

nl_query: What is the average freight value by seller state?
sql: SELECT s.seller_state, ROUND(AVG(i.freight_value), 2) AS avg_freight FROM order_items i JOIN sellers s ON i.seller_id = s.seller_id GROUP BY s.seller_state ORDER BY avg_freight DESC

nl_query: How many unique customers made purchases in 2017?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_unique_id) AS unique_customers FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE YEAR(STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) = 2017

nl_query: What is the average number of installments for credit card payments?
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(payment_installments), 2) AS avg_installments FROM payments WHERE payment_type = 'credit_card'

nl_query: Which product categories have the worst average review scores?
sql: SELECT p.product_category_name, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_score, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM reviews r JOIN order_items i ON r.order_id = i.order_id JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY avg_score ASC LIMIT 10

nl_query: What is the total freight cost vs product price ratio by category?
sql: SELECT p.product_category_name, ROUND(SUM(i.freight_value) / SUM(i.price), 4) AS freight_to_price_ratio FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name ORDER BY freight_to_price_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

nl_query: How many orders were canceled in each month of 2018?
sql: SELECT MONTH(STRPTIME(order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) AS month,COUNT(*) AS cancelled_count FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'canceled' AND YEAR(STRPTIME(order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) = 2018 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl_query: Which English product category names have the highest average price?
sql: SELECT t.product_category_name_english, ROUND(AVG(i.price), 2) AS avg_price FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN category_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY t.product_category_name_english ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 10

nl_query: What is the month-over-month revenue growth in 2018?
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT MONTH(STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) AS month, SUM(i.price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE YEAR(STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M')) = 2018 GROUP BY month) SELECT month, ROUND(revenue, 2) AS revenue, ROUND(100.0 * (revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS mom_growth_pct FROM monthly ORDER BY month

nl_query: Which sellers have both high revenue and high average review scores?
sql: SELECT i.seller_id, ROUND(SUM(i.price), 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 2) AS avg_review FROM order_items i JOIN reviews r ON i.order_id = r.order_id GROUP BY i.seller_id HAVING total_revenue > 50000 AND avg_review >= 4.0 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_query: What is the average time between order purchase and delivery by customer state?
sql: SELECT c.customer_state,ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF('day',STRPTIME(o.order_purchase_timestamp, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M'),STRPTIME(o.order_delivered_customer_date, '%d-%m-%Y %H:%M'))),1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY avg_delivery_days
